name: VideoSEMA: a scalable and efficient Mamba-like attention for video understanding

description: arXiv:2607.14711v2 Announce Type: replace-cross Abstract: We present for video understanding (classification) a split space-time attention model, VideoSEMA, consisting of a scalable and efficient Mamba-like attention (SEMA) block in space and a softmax temporal attention in time. In each frame, SEMA attention applies a local window attention in parallel with a global averaging in a Mamba macro-...
author: Nhat Thanh Tran, Fanghui Xue, Shuai Zhang, Jiancheng Lyu, Yunling Zheng, Yingyong Qi, Jack Xin
